name: Fantasy world
description:
A bot for those who want to show off their RP. It's nothing new.

Fantasy world

This bot was created by me. I was bored, so I thought I'd create a definition for a fantasy-themed bot.

Surprisingly, this bot's definition works very well, but only on sites that have Gemini built into them.

I have to admit, I want to check with the janitor. This version of the results hasn't been tested on this bot yet, so it may vary.

The plot is in the definition; Simple, concise and to the point.

I recommend setting the janitor to 80 - 100 tokens
creator: Cool RP creator
